blocking_gaps.notes: Need safe read-only proof of live candle timestamps per pair/timeframe.
Need final enter_long/enter_short/enter_tag evidence per pair/candle.
Need evidence of which inherited V11 gate allowed, retagged, or blocked entries.
Need safe category-only custom stake evidence without balances or secrets.

verdict.reason: This implementation creates the telemetry sample structure from clean audit evidence. It proves local fallback data staleness, but does not prove live DataProvider freshness or the exact no-entry reason.
verdict.next_required_task: Task 31: V11.29 Safe Runtime Data Freshness Probe
